slides.title: Always tired? *Check your iron stores*.
slides.sub: Low ferritin — your stored iron — is one of the most overlooked causes of fatigue, especially in women.

slides.title: Ferritin runs low first
slides.body: Ferritin is your stored iron. It can drop *long before anemia shows* on a standard blood test.

slides.title: Women feel it most
slides.body: Monthly blood loss makes low ferritin common — up to *1 in 3 menstruating people* run low.

slides.title: More than just tired
slides.body: Brain fog, breathlessness on stairs, brittle nails, hair shedding. *Energy that sleep won't fix.*

slides.title: Ask for the number
slides.body: A standard panel may miss it. Ask your doctor for a *ferritin test* specifically.

slides.title: Pair iron with vitamin C
slides.body: Red meat, lentils and spinach deliver iron. *Vitamin C* alongside helps your body absorb it.

slides.title: Track the tired, *find the cause*.
slides.body: Vibe Health logs your sleep, energy and habits in one daily Health Score — so patterns like fatigue stop hiding.

caption:
Tired no matter how much you sleep? Your iron stores might be the reason. 🩸

Low ferritin can drop long before anemia shows up, it's especially common in women, and a normal blood panel can miss it — so ask for a ferritin test. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health pulls your sleep and energy into one place so the real pattern shows up → link in bio.
youtube_title: The Overlooked Reason You're Always Tired
